title: bidens vulgata
intro: Bidens vulgata, also known as the common beggar lice or tickweed, is a perennial herb native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular remedy for colds, flu, and wounds. Bidens vulgata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in salves and creams to promote wound healing and skin health.
